message:
Add cost-based query planner with join reordering and selectivity estimation

Implement a full cost-based query planner (crates/fsqlite-planner/src/lib.rs,
+892 lines) that brings the project from scaffolding toward real query
optimization:

Plan nodes:
- SeqScan, IndexScan, NestedLoopJoin, HashJoin, Sort, Filter, Project,
  Aggregate, Limit, and Union plan node types with recursive cost
  propagation

Cost model:
- CostModel struct with configurable I/O cost, CPU cost, and memory
  budget parameters
- Histogram-based selectivity estimation for range and equality
  predicates
- Cardinality estimation that flows through join and filter nodes

Optimization:
- PlanEnumerator with dynamic-programming join reordering that explores
  all join orderings for small join counts and uses greedy heuristics
  for larger queries
- Optimizer applying both rule-based transformations (predicate pushdown,
  projection pruning) and cost-based plan selection

Supporting changes:
- Add new decision_contract variant for planner decision auditing
- Update planner decision contract test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
